SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AccountFragment
A fragment that allows the user to view and manage their account information.
AdminActivity
Host activity for the administrator section of the application.
AdminEventDetailFragment
Admin detail screen for a single Event.
AdminManageEventsFragment
Admin fragment for browsing and managing all events in the platform.
AdminManageNotificationsFragment
Admin fragment for reviewing all notification logs recorded in the notification_logs Firestore collection.
AdminManageProfilesFragment
Admin fragment that displays all registered user profiles in a 3-column grid.
AdminNotificationLogAdapter
Adapter for displaying notification log entries in the admin notification management screen.
AdminUserAdapter
RecyclerView adapter that displays all registered users in the admin user-management screen.
AdminUserAdapter.OnUserClickListener
Callback invoked when an admin taps a user card.
AdminUserDetailBottomSheet
Bottom-sheet dialog that shows full profile details for a single Users object in the admin console.
AdminUserDetailBottomSheet.OnAccountDeletedListener
Callback invoked after the admin successfully deletes a user account so the parent fragment can remove the entry from its list without a full reload.
AdminUserDetailBottomSheet.OnEventClickListener
Callback used to navigate to the full detail screen of a created event.
AdminUserEventAdapter
RecyclerView adapter that lists events belonging to a specific user in the admin user-detail screen.
AdminUserEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
Callback invoked when an admin taps an event row in the user-detail screen.
CancelledEntrantAdapter
RecyclerView adapter used to display cancelled and declined entrants.
CaptureActivityPortrait
A custom CaptureActivity that is locked in portrait orientation.
Comment
Represents a comment object on an event.
CommentAdapter
Adapter for displaying a list of comments in a RecyclerView within the Event view.
CommentAdapter.OnCommentDeleteListener
Callback invoked when a comment should be deleted.
CreateEventFragment
A fragment that allows users to create a new event.
CSVExporter
Utility class to handle exporting data to a CSV file.
CSVExporter.CsvRowMapper<T>
Strategy interface that converts a domain object into an ordered array of CSV field values.
DeleteEventDialogFragment
A dialog fragment that prompts the user to confirm the deletion of an event.
DeleteEventDialogFragment.OnFragmentInteractionListener
Interface for receiving deletion confirmation events.
EditEventFragment
A fragment that allows users to edit an existing event.
EnrolledEntrantAdapter
RecyclerView adapter used to display enrolled entrants.
EnrolledEntrantAdapter.OnCancelEntrantListener
Triggers when the organizer cancels an enrolled entrant.
Entrant
Represents an applicant/entrant for an event waitlist.
Entrant.Status
Enumeration of possible statuses for an entrant.
EntrantAdapter
Adapter class for a RecyclerView that displays a list of Entrant objects.
EntrantAdapter.OnCancelEntrantListener
Triggers when the organizer cancels an invited entrant.
EntrantAdapter.OnViewLocationListener
Opens the map focused on this entrant (when they have coordinates).
EntrantMapFragment
Read-only OSMDroid map that visualises where entrants joined the waitlist for a given event.
Event
Represents an event in the EventsApp system.
EventArrayAdapter
A custom ArrayAdapter for displaying a list of Event objects in a ListView.
EventCleanupHelper
Helper class that handles automatic cleanup of expired events.
EventDetailFragment
A fragment that displays the full details of a specific event.
EventDialogFragment
A dialog fragment for adding or editing basic event details (name and capacity).
EventsFragment
A fragment that displays a list of events associated with the current user.
EventValidator
Utility class for validating event creation input.
EventValidator.PeriodResult
Result codes returned by EventValidator.validateRegistrationPeriod(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String).
ExploreFilterBottomSheet
Bottom sheet dialog for applying filters on the Explore page.
ExploreFilterBottomSheet.OnFilterAppliedListener
Callback interface invoked when the user confirms their filter selections.
ExploreFilterHelper
Pure filter logic for the Explore page.
ExploreFragment
A fragment that allows users to explore and search for all available events.
FirestoreNotificationHelper
Helper for writing inbox notifications to Firestore for real event activity.
InboxFragment
A fragment that displays the user's notification inbox.
InvitationResponseController
Controller class responsible for handling user responses to event invitations.
LotteryNotificationController
Controller class responsible for managing notifications related to the event lottery process.
MainActivity
The primary host activity of the application.
NotificationItem
Represents a notification sent to a user in the event application.
NotificationLogItem
POJO representing a document in the global notification_logs Firestore collection.
OrganizerCancelledFragment
Organizer-facing fragment that displays entrants whose status is Entrant.Status.CANCELLED or Entrant.Status.DECLINED for a given event.
OrganizerEnrolledFragment
Fragment that displays the final list of entrants enrolled (ACCEPTED) in an event.
OrganizerWaitlistFragment
Organizer-facing fragment that displays entrants in the APPLIED, INVITED, and PRIVATE_INVITED states for a given event.
QRCodeUtil
Utility class for generating QR codes.
RecipientAdapter
Simple adapter that displays recipient names in a nested RecyclerView.
SignInFragment
A fragment that handles user authentication, including sign-in and sign-up.
SplashActivity
Full-screen branded splash with a logo assembly animation: 1.
TigerToast
Drop-in replacement for Toast.makeText(android.content.Context, int, int) that shows the tiger logo alongside the message in a styled pill-shaped card.
UserManager
Singleton manager class for handling the current user session and authentication state.
UserManager.SessionBootstrapCallback
 
UserNotification
Represents a notification intended for a user within the application's UI.
UserNotification.Type
Enumeration of notification types.
Users
Represents a user in the EventsApp system.
WaitlistLocationForegroundService
Keeps publishing the entrant's device location to Firestore while they are on a waitlist, so organizers see near–real-time positions on the map even when this app is in the background.
